title: Types of structure: functional, hierarchical (flat and narrow), matrix
summary: 9609 A Level — functional, hierarchical, flat, narrow, and matrix structures.

simpleExplanation.title: Shapes of organisations
simpleExplanation.summary: Functional groups by department; hierarchy shows levels of command; matrix combines functions and projects.
steps: Tall narrow: many layers, tight control.
Flat wide: few layers, faster decisions.

sections.content: **Structure types** (7.1.2) is heavily diagram-based. Sketch **charts** and label **span of control**.
